title: Update existing PAYMENT.CAPTURE.REFUNDED test to use captureId field
body: The existing test 'PAYMENT.CAPTURE.REFUNDED should update transaction to refunded' at tests/int/payment-webhook-entitlements.int.spec.ts:1408 creates a transaction with providerTransactionId set to the capture ID value. This relies on the legacy fallback. Update the test to use the captureId field (matching the new behavior): providerTransactionId=orderId, captureId=captureId. The fallback handles legacy transactions.
rationale: The test documents legacy behavior but should be updated to reflect the post-fix expected behavior.
